narrative: A passerby spends part of their break helping someone move a stalled cart out of a busy path. Later, the helped person notices the passerby carrying a heavy bundle and has a chance to assist in return.
high_response: I will offer to help carry the bundle. They used their own time to help me when I needed it, and returning that kindness keeps the exchange respectful.
low_response: I will thank them again but continue on my way. Their help was generous, but it does not create an obligation for me to step into a new task later.
